title: lithocarpus urceolaris
intro: Lithocarpus urceolaris, also known as the Chinese bur oak or haw haw tree, is a deciduous tree species native to China. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and rheumatism, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus urceolaris include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Lithocarpus urceolaris is traditionally prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in modern herbal medicine in various forms, including capsules and extracts.
